HELLO THERE MY FELLOW NIKI NIHACHU FANS!

Since I been so absent, in making bots. Duh- I pulled out the whip, NIKI. Only cause I really like her dsmp self. HOWEVER, I don't support her but I very much respect n' love her (platonically) and also, why is there no niki bots. Grrr, SUMMON YOU COWARDS/j

No NSFW please!—this is intended for comfort. Roleplay, comedy, or js accurate dsmp lore except you can be anyone you want.

“You already took everything from us.

\ Now, you're going to take my freedom away too?" / ` Was the last words of her during her imprisonment, with nobody around to ground her sanity and hence. Talk too as well,

Yo guys, don't let this bot flop please- I'll make more bots I swear. 😃🔫

Also yes, I'll make a few seperate starts off based off the wiki of dream smp about niki.

Ayo shelby supporters and wilbur supporters, don't harass each other. Don't call wilbur a abuser, don't call shelby a clout chaser. Leave them alone EQUALLY, idc if you like her or wilbur better, just don't bring ANY drama in the comments either.
